Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet collects offer and requests token using DPoP proof; Wallet receives nonce
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP proof with thumbprint
- Token endpoint returning nonce
Expected Result: Wallet successfully obtains access token and nonce

Action: Wallet requests credential using DPoP proof with the same nonce (replay attempt)
Data:
- Access token
- Same DPoP proof with replayed nonce
- Credential endpoint
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 400; nonce reuse is detected and rejected
